title: Fresno, CA — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Fresno, CA: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Fresno is a city in CA with a population of 542,107. Agricultural capital with proximity to Yosemite, cheaper than coastal CA, but hot summers.

Last updated: July 06, 2026
